title: matricaria rupestris
intro: Matricaria rupestris, also known as wild chamomile or rock chamomile, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful for soothing digestive issues and calming the nervous system. The health benefits of Matricaria rupestris include reducing anxiety and insomnia, alleviating menstrual cramps, and promoting relaxation. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
